import type { TableBuilderConfig, TableRow } from "../../components/tables/types";

export interface Row extends TableRow {
  "task": string;
  "status": string;
  "assignee": string;
  "due": string;
  "priority": string;
}


export const tableConfig: TableBuilderConfig = {
  "title": "Project Tasks",
  "description": "Track team tasks with assignees and priorities.",
  "direction": "ltr",
  "density": "comfortable",
  "pageSize": 10,
  "sortMode": "client",
  "paginationMode": "client",
  "expandableLayout": "details",
  "expandableIconStyle": "chevron",
  "expandableIconPosition": "first",
  "paginationLayout": "full",
  "pageSizeOptions": [
    5,
    10,
    20,
    50,
    100
  ],
  "virtualRowHeight": 44,
  "virtualMaxHeight": 520,
  "enableSearch": true,
  "enablePagination": true,
  "enableRowSelection": true,
  "enableDnD": false,
  "enableColumnVisibility": true,
  "enableExport": true,
  "enableStriped": false,
  "enableHover": true,
  "enableBordered": false,
  "enableStickyHeader": false,
  "enableExpandableRows": false,
  "enableInlineEdit": true,
  "enableBulkActions": false,
  "enableColumnResize": false,
  "enableMultiSort": true,
  "enableColumnFilters": true,
  "enableRowGrouping": false,
  "enableAggregation": false,
  "enableFooter": false,
  "columns": [
    {
      "id": "c1",
      "key": "task",
      "label": "Task",
      "type": "text",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "width": 280,
      "resizable": true
    },
    {
      "id": "c2",
      "key": "status",
      "label": "Status",
      "type": "status-dot",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "Not started",
          "value": "Not started",
          "color": "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))"
        },
        {
          "label": "In progress",
          "value": "In progress",
          "color": "hsl(217 91% 60%)"
        },
        {
          "label": "Done",
          "value": "Done",
          "color": "hsl(142 71% 45%)"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c3",
      "key": "assignee",
      "label": "Assignee",
      "type": "avatar",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c4",
      "key": "due",
      "label": "Due Date",
      "type": "date",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left"
    },
    {
      "id": "c5",
      "key": "priority",
      "label": "Priority",
      "type": "dropdown",
      "sortable": true,
      "filterable": true,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "left",
      "options": [
        {
          "label": "High",
          "value": "High"
        },
        {
          "label": "Medium",
          "value": "Medium"
        },
        {
          "label": "Low",
          "value": "Low"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "c6",
      "key": "actions",
      "label": "",
      "type": "actions",
      "sortable": false,
      "filterable": false,
      "visible": true,
      "align": "right"
    }
  ]
} as const satisfies TableBuilderConfig;
